sourceSummary.oneLine: SGS Korea test report for antimony (Sb) in tesa 4926, with client reference models 4965, 4967, 4942, 4928, 4982, 4980, 4972, and 4983.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Provides sample-specific heavy metals test results and method references for material compliance documentation.
keyPoints: Sample AYAA18-31968.001 is described as tesa 4926.
Antimony (Sb) result is N.D. mg/kg with MDL 10.
Test method references EPA 3052(1996), US EPA 6010B(1996), and ICP.

reviewFlags.reason: No regulatory authority or jurisdiction is identified; SGS Korea Co., Ltd. appears to be the issuing test laboratory rather than a regulatory authority.
Received date and test period text appears ambiguous or conflicting: '2018. 06. 15 to 2018. 06. 11 Test Period : Received Date'.
The source path omits 4942, but the OCR source text lists 4942 in Client Reference Data.
